LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JOHN MILLS' MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE AND SERVE FOURTH AMENDED VERIFIED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. AMENDMENTS 3, 7 AND 8 ARE ALLOWED. THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS TO BE DEEMED FILED ON APRIL 17, 2007 AND THE ALLEGATIONS ARE DEEMED CONTROVERTED BY THE PRIOR ANSWERS OF THE PARTIES. THE REMAINING AMENDMENTS ARE DENIED. DELETIONS ARE NOT SANCTIONED AND THE OTHER AMENDMENTS ARE SURPLUSAGE. MR. MILLS IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN, CSR 4780
